calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Re Amended Trust And Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-24-2019 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions Re Amended Trust And Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Continued To Jul-24-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of Agreement, Indemnification And Mutual Release
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yulissa Zulaica for Anthony Abuzeide (Petitioner).
Ben Riley for Beatrice Clarot (Respondent).

The Parties indicated that they are in agreement with the settlement and that there is nothing further. The Petition for Approval of Agreement, Indemnification and Mutual Release is under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions Re Amended Trust And Accounting
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Continued To Jul-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Re Amended Trust And Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-12-2019 Continued To May-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Re Amended Trust And Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-13-2019 Continued To Mar-27-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Re Amended Trust And Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Continued To Mar-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-18-302276 The Revocable Trust Declaration Creating The Jack Dane Trust and PTR-18-302234 The Jack Dane Trust.

Appearances: Benjamin Riley for Petitioner.
Yulissa Zulaica for Anthony Abuzeide (Trustee/Respondent).
Jeffrey Loew for Anthony Abuzeide, Jeremy Lewis and Andrew Weeks (Beneficiaries).

Counsel stated that they have spoken, that they are conducting discovery (document requests/depositions), suggested setting a trial in May, stated that it will be a three to four day trial, that they have not spoken about mediation and that they need 90 to 120-days to determine whether they will be in a position to mediate. Mr. Loew stated that they disagree on the nature of the case. The Petition to Determine Validity of Trust Provision and the Petition for Instructions Re Amended Trust, etc. are continued to March 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that it will not set a trial date until it knows the case is ready for trial. The Parties are to meet and confer, and provide a joint status statement.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions Re Amended Trust And Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Dec-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
